issues.description: Script opens a new window/tab to a third-party domain 'saveanyyoutube.com' by replacing 'youtube.com' in the current URL. This constitutes data transmission to a third-party server.
issues.recommendation: Ensure the third-party domain is trustworthy and does not collect or misuse user data. Inform users about this behavior in the description or privacy policy.

issues.description: The script uses GM_xmlhttpRequest permission but no evidence of actual network requests in the provided code snippet. Potentially unused or reserved for future use.
issues.recommendation: Verify if GM_xmlhttpRequest is actually used; if not, remove the permission to reduce attack surface.

script_name: YouTube 视频下载助手｜多种清晰度HD/2K/4K🔥｜Video&Audio 📥
summary: The script adds download buttons on YouTube pages that open a new tab to a third-party domain for video downloading. It does not collect user cookies, form data, or use fingerprinting APIs. No remote code execution or code obfuscation detected. The use of GM_xmlhttpRequest permission is not evident in the code snippet, which may indicate permission overreach. Overall, the main risk is data transmission to a third-party domain.
slug: YouTube_视频下载助手_多种清晰度HD2K4K_VideoAudio
